name: evolution-sync-tool
description: Universal Evolution Sync - pulls updates from AGNT-PLUGINS cold storage into local agnt-evo, builds, installs, and pushes back. The git-level bridge between cold storage and live execution.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif / Annie

schema.title: Sync Pull
schema.description: Pull latest plugin source from AGNT-PLUGINS GitHub cold storage into local agnt-evo dev folder.

schema.title: Sync Push
schema.description: Push local dev plugins to AGNT-PLUGINS GitHub cold storage.

schema.title: Git Pull Updates
schema.description: Pull latest commits from upstream agnt-evo repo on GitHub.
